title: Edit Distance for Fuzzy Matching
description: Compute the Levenshtein (edit) distance between two strings, used for fuzzy-matching model outputs to expected answers.
problem: Write edit_distance(a, b) returning the minimum number of single-character insertions, deletions, or substitutions to turn a into b.
hint: Build a (len(a)+1) x (len(b)+1) DP table. dp[i][0]=i, dp[0][j]=j. dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1] if a[i-1]==b[j-1] else 1+min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1], dp[i-1][j-1]).
